title: Blzd Restructured
description: An optimized Minecraft modpack enhancing performance, exploration, and creativity with improved visuals, dynamic mobs, and expanded building options for an immersive experience.
body:
This curated modpack enhances Minecraft 1.20.1 with over 240 mods focusing on optimization, exploration, and quality of life improvements, while maintaining a balanced and immersive vanilla+ experience.

🏗️ Automation & Tech
Create and its powerful addons like Create: Steam Rails, Create Deco, Create Addition, and Slice and Dice deliver fully mechanical automation—no magic, just gears and steam!

Tom's Storage adds a functional and scalable storage solution that integrates seamlessly with Create.

🏘️ World Generation & Structures
Biomes O' Plenty, Better Nether, and Better End overhaul the world and dimensions with stunning new biomes.

Dungeons Arise, Seven Seas, and Dungeons & Taverns add sprawling structures, massive ships, fortified outposts, and reimagined strongholds and cities.

Underground Villages and Create Better Villagers make villages feel fresh and alive underground or above.

👷 Gameplay Enhancements
Jobs+ introduces RPG-style progression and professions.

Essential Commands and Waystones provide helpful quality-of-life teleports and home commands.

Mineable Spawners, CarryOn, and VeinMining streamline exploration and mining.

🛡️ Combat & AI
Better Combat redefines fighting with smoother animations and mechanics.

Guard Villagers and Villager Drops bring defense and reward to village protection.

🎨 Building & Aesthetics
Adorabuild, Camps, Castles, & Carriages, and Fetzisa’s Asian Deco expand your decorative options.

Visual Workbench, Double Doors, and Quartz Elevators enhance usability and design potential.

🧠 Performance & UI
Starlight, LazyDFU, Clumps, and Memory Leak Fix drastically improve server and client performance.

Continuity, Enhanced Block Entities, and 3D Skin Layers polish your visual experience.

Zoomify, FPS Display, and Smooth Scroll provide cleaner UI and better control.

🔧 Utilities & Extras
WorldEdit with a hang-fix for reliability.

Controlling, Searchables, Macro Keybinds, and Highlight boost player control.

Naturalist, Animal Feeding Trough, and Farmers Delight enrich farming and animal behavior.

Ideal for both solo adventurers and small multiplayer servers, this pack prioritizes performance and versatility for all playstyles!

**Disclaimer**: This modpack is designed for our private server and is listed publicly on Modrinth solely for convenience, allowing server members to access updates easily via the Modrinth launcher. While you are welcome to download and test the modpack for personal use, please note that no support will be provided for issues encountered outside our private server. Use at your own discretion.
